notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson grounds into a double play, shortstop Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. Samuel Basallo out at 2nd. Jeremiah Jackson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Caleb Durbin reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jeremiah Jackson. Marcelo Mayer to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Colton Cowser pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colton Cowser singles on a ground ball to second baseman Marcelo Mayer.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Catcher Samuel Basallo picks off Wilyer Abreu at 1st on throw to first baseman Pete Alonso.

notableEvents.label: Caleb Durbin reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Caleb Durbin reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jeremiah Jackson. Marcelo Mayer to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
